title: Agent
description: Defines an AI agent's identity, purpose, owners, approved capabilities, lifecycle state, risk tier, and governance boundaries.

risk_tier.description: Risk tier for the registered object.

owner.description: Accountable owner. String form is allowed for v0.1 examples; structured ownership is preferred for richer governance.

description.description: Optional longer description of the agent.

purpose.description: Business purpose the agent is approved to serve.

workload_identity.description: Provider-neutral workload identity metadata. Do not store secrets here.

identity_type.description: Identity type, such as service_account or managed_identity.

identity_ref.description: Reference to the scoped workload identity.

scopes.description: High-level identity scopes or permission groups.

approved_skills.description: Skill IDs this agent is approved to request.

approved_tools.description: Tool IDs this agent may use through approved skills and policies.

allowed_channels.description: Channels where the agent may operate.

data_classes.description: Data classifications the agent may access when policy allows.

context_scopes.description: Context scope IDs this agent may request.

memory_policy.description: Memory permissions, retention expectations, and reset requirements.

evaluation_pack_ref.description: Evaluation pack ID required for certification.

evaluation_refs.description: Additional evaluation IDs associated with this agent.

slo_profile.description: SLO profile ID or name for availability, latency, and reliability expectations.

emergency_stop.description: Emergency stop controls for blocking agent operation.

enabled.description: Whether emergency stop controls are defined.

blocked.description: Whether the agent is currently blocked by emergency stop.

audit_refs.description: Audit event IDs associated with approval or operation.
